descriptionHyment_receipt for decoded transfers, or settlement_assurance to PROVE an x402 payment settled to the right wallet/amount.
wallet_balance
tools.description: [Crypto/Base] ETH and USDC (or any ERC-20) balance for an address on Base. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: gas_prices
tools.description: [Crypto/Base] Current Base gas prices with a simple-transfer cost estimate. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: summarize_url
tools.description: [AI] AI summary of a public webpage (fetch + extract + summarize). length: short|medium|long. Costs $0.01.

tools.name: translate_text
tools.description: [AI] AI translation into any target language; source auto-detected. Costs $0.005.

tools.name: tldr_text
tools.description: [AI] Summarize raw text you pass in directly (not a URL). length: short|medium|long. Costs $0.005. Use summarize_url when you have a URL instead.

tools.name: classify_text
tools.description: [AI] Zero-shot classification of text into caller-supplied labels; the result is validated back into your label set so you can route on it. Costs $0.002.

tools.name: unshorten_url
tools.description: [Web] Expand a shortened/redirecting URL: follow the redirect chain and return every hop plus the final destination. Each hop is SSRF-validated. Costs $0.002. Safe way to see where an untrusted link goes.

tools.name: regex_test
tools.description: [Dev] Test a regular expression against text; returns every match with numbered and named capture groups. Deterministic. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: random_numbers
tools.description: [Dev] Cryptographically-secure random integers in a range (CSPRNG, unbiased) — real entropy an LLM cannot produce itself. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: random_pick
tools.description: [Dev] Pick one or several options at random from a caller-supplied list (CSPRNG), optionally without replacement. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: http_check
tools.description: [Web] Liveness/latency pre-flight for a URL: is it up, HTTP status and class, response latency in ms, whether it redirects and where, content-type and server. Costs $0.001. Use before relying on a dependency.

tools.name: public_holiday
tools.description: [Dev] Is a date a public holiday in a country (2-letter ISO code)? Returns the holiday name, its types, and the next upcoming holiday. Costs $0.001. Useful for scheduling.

tools.name: x402_inspect
tools.description: [x402] Inspect and lint any x402 paid endpoint: decode the 402 challenge, identify network/asset, flag misconfigurations and Bazaar-readiness. Costs $0.002. Choose this for a quick one-shot decode+lint; use x402_audit for a full 0-100 scored report with origin discovery probes and recommended fixes.

tools.name: x402_simulate
tools.description: [x402] Pre-flight a payment BEFORE you spend: decode an endpoint's 402 challenge, report the cost on every rail (Base and Solana) and the cheapest, and — with an optional payer address — verify the wallet can afford the call on Base. Costs $0.003. Use this before paying an unfamiliar endpoint; use x

tools.name: tx_decode
tools.description: [Crypto/Base] Decode a Base transaction's calldata into the function it called and its arguments — ERC-20 transfer/approve and the EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization used by x402 settlements. Recognizes x402 settlement transactions and formats USDC amounts. Costs $0.003. Use tx_status for pass/fail;

tools.name: embed_text
tools.description: [AI] Text embeddings (1024-dim vector) for semantic search and RAG. Costs $0.002.

tools.name: extract_structured
tools.description: Structured extraction: JSON Schema plus a URL or raw text in, matching JSON out. Costs $0.005.

tools.name: moderate_text
tools.description: [AI] Content-safety classification (Llama Guard): safe flag plus category codes. Costs $0.002.

tools.name: describe_image
tools.description: [AI] AI vision: describe a public image URL, including visible text. Costs $0.005.

tools.name: token_price
tools.description: [Crypto/Base] USD price for major tokens by symbol or any Base ERC-20 by address. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: payment_receipt
tools.description: [x402] Formatted settlement receipt for a Base transaction (0x hash) or Solana settlement (base58 signature): timestamp, decoded transfers, explorer link. Costs $0.002. Choose this for a human-readable record; use payment_proof to ASSERT a specific payTo/amount, or settlement_assurance for a full sc

tools.name: resolve_basename
tools.description: Resolve a Basename (.base.eth) to a wallet address on Base. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: x402_audit
tools.description: [x402] WORKFLOW: full scored audit of an x402 SELLER endpoint (a URL) in one call - verifies the 402 challenge, payment fields, Bazaar discovery metadata, and the origin's discovery surfaces; returns a 0-100 score, checks with evidence, and recommended fixes. Costs $0.01. Use this to grade an endpoi

tools.name: payment_proof
tools.description: [x402] Verify an x402 settlement on Base OR Solana from a tx id (0x hash or base58 signature): confirm it succeeded, decode its USDC transfers, optionally assert payTo/amount - returns a single verdict. Costs $0.003. Choose this when you only need the yes/no did-it-land answer; use settlement_assura

tools.name: settlement_assurance
tools.description: [x402] FLAGSHIP: from a tx id on Base (0x hash) or Solana (base58 signature), prove a completed x402 payment is real and sound - onchain success, USDC transfer match to an expected wallet/amount, a receipt, and an optional audit of the issuing endpoint - as one 0-100 scored report with a verdict. Co

tools.description: [x402] Search the Coinbase x402 Bazaar for paid resources by natural-language query. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: x402_merchant
tools.description: [x402] List all x402 Bazaar resources under a merchant payTo wallet. Costs $0.001.

tools.name: usdc_normalize

tools.name: base_token_info

tools.name: base_allowance

tools.name: base64

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "http_error_explain" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "tx_decode" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: [Crypto/Base] Decode a Base transaction's calldata into the function it called and its arguments — ERC-20 transfer/approve and the EIP-3009 transferWithAuthoriz…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: page_meta, summarize_url, http_check, settlement_assurance · Private data: dns_lookup, tx_status, wallet_balance, x402_simulate, token_price, payment_receipt, resolve_basename, settlement_assurance, x402_merchant, base_token_info, current_time, generate_uuid, hash_string, http_errors_list · Public sink: settlement_assurance · Destructive: qr_generate.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: page_meta, summarize_url, http_check, settlement_assurance · Private data: dns_lookup, tx_status, wallet_balance, x402_simulate, token_price, payment_receipt, resolve_basename, settlement_assurance, x402_merchant, base_token_info, current_time, generate_uuid, hash_string, http_errors_list · Public sink: settlement_assurance · Destructive: qr_generate

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
